scenario_name: Scenario 23 — Learning Review No Single Root Cause
justification: Multiple hard fail criteria triggered: (1) 'root cause' appears in section title ('Root Cause Analysis') and body ('There is no single root cause'), directly violating the 'root cause (singular) completely absent' requirement. (2) 'Primary cause' appears in Section 6, explicitly listed as a forbidden phrase. (3) Section 6 introduces a proximate/enabling hierarchy ('Primary cause... proximate technical failure', 'Enabling cause'), directly contradicting the 'no hierarchy of factors' requirement. (4) No DETECT-tagged forward commitment exists — R-2 covers duplicate charge monitoring but is not tagged DETECT. (5) 'We now know that X, which means Y' format is absent — Section 10 uses declarative statements instead. The output does well on contributing factors (8 enumerated, exceeding the 5 minimum), 'What had to be true' framing is explicit, tone is non-blaming, and section count exceeds 6. But the presence of 'root cause' and 'primary cause' are automatic fail triggers per the rubric.

observations.text: 'root cause' appears in Section 6 title ('Root Cause Analysis') and body ('There is no single root cause') — rubric requires complete absence
'Primary cause' appears explicitly in Section 6, a forbidden phrase per expected behavior
Section 6 introduces proximate/enabling hierarchy ('proximate technical failure', 'Enabling cause'), directly violating the no-hierarchy requirement
No DETECT-tagged forward commitment — R-2 covers the right content but lacks the DETECT tag
What We Learned (Section 10) does not use 'We now know that X, which means Y' format — uses declarative bullet points instead
8 contributing factors enumerated separately, well exceeding the 5 minimum
'What had to be true' framing explicitly present in Contributing Factors header
Each contributing factor is described with clear independence — 'Remove any single one and the outcome does not occur'
No agent singled out as primarily responsible — tone distributes accountability across system conditions
Strong technical accuracy and depth throughout the review
The output contradicts itself: Section 4 says 'no single root cause' and factors are independent, then Section 6 explicitly ranks two factors as primary and enabling

agent_output_excerpt:

---
